meta.title: PONG - ft_transcendence
meta.description: Play the classic Pong game online!

common.title: PONG
common.password_required: Password is required to access your account

errors.accept_terms_required: You must accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
errors.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.match_not_saved: Failed to save match (you must be logged in to save match)

register.subtitle: Join the game and start playing!
register.privacy_note: We use your email and username to create and secure your accounts. No tracking or analytics cookies are used.
register.password_hint: Must be 8+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, and number

who_we_are.title: Who We Are
who_we_are.body: This website (“we”, “us”, “our”) provides an online Pong game (the “Service”). This application is operated by Pixies that Ride Pink Pony Unicorns (the “Team”), a student project created as part of an academic program at 42Berlin.

data_collect.title: What Data do we Collect
data_collect.intro: We collect only the data required to operate the game:
data_collect.username_desc: to identify players in the game
data_collect.email_desc: used for account-related communication (e.g. account creation, password recovery)

legal_basis.title: Why we collect this data (Legal Basis)
legal_basis.intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), we must have a legal reason to process your data. We rely on:
legal_basis.contractual_item: Your username and email are required to create and maintain a game account.
legal_basis.legit_item: To ensure the security, stability, and proper functioning of the Service.

items.account: Create and manage your game account
items.participate: Allow users to participate in the game
items.communicate: Communicate with you about your account (email)
items.security: Maintain the security and proper functioning of the application

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell or use personal data for advertising. Data is only processed by technical service providers required to run the application.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.body: Personal data is stored only for as long as the user account remains active. Users may request deletion of their account at any time.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data in accordance with GDPR. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: This website uses essential cookies that are required for core functionality, such as user authentication and maintaining active sessions. We do not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or third-party analytics cookies. If this changes, this policy will be updated accordingly.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: For privacy-related requests, contact us at:

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: Welcome to ft_transcendence (“the Service”), a web-based multiplayer application developed as part of the 42 curriculum. By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service (“Terms”). If you do not agree with these Terms, you must not use the Service.

description.title: Description of the Service
description.intro: The Service is provided for educational and demonstration purposes only and is an online platform that allows users to:

items.account: Create an account using an email address and username
items.realtime: Participate in real-time features such as matches, tournaments, or chat

eligibility.title: Eligibility

items.age: Be at least 13 years old to use the Service
items.accurate: Provide accurate and complete registration information
items.security: Maintain the security of your account credentials

eligibility.note: You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.intro: When creating an account, you agree to:

items.impersonate: Not impersonate another person or entity
items.share: Not share your login credential with others

accounts.note: We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these Terms.

acceptable_use.title: Acceptable Use

items.illegal: Use the Service for illegal purposes
items.harass: Harass, abuse, threaten, or harm other users
items.malicious: Upload malicious code or attempt to compromise system security
items.exploit: Exploit bugs, cheats, or unintended gameplay mechanics
items.unauthorized: Attempt unauthorised access to accounts, servers, or data

acceptable_use.note: Violation of these rules may result in account suspension or termination.

ugc.title: User-Generated Content
ugc.intro: You are responsible for any content you submit, including:
ugc.prohibited_intro: You agree not to submit content that is:

items.illegal: Illegal or infringing on others’ rights

ugc.note: We reserve the right to remove content that violates these Terms.

privacy.title: Privacy and Data Protection
privacy.intro: Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains:
privacy.note: Please review the Privacy Policy carefully before using the Service.

availability.title: Availability and Changes
availability.intro: The Service is provided “as is” and “as available”. We do not guarantee:

items.preservation: Preservation of data or game statistics

availability.note: As this is an educational project, features may change, reset, or be removed at any time.

termination.title: Termination
termination.intro: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service:

items.security: If required for security or maintenance reasons

termination.note: You may stop using the Service at any time.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.intro: All code, design, and content related to ft_transcendence:

items.owned: Is owned by the project contributors
items.commercial: May not be reused commercially without permission

ip.note: User-generated content remains the property of the user who created it.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law:

items.loss: We are not liable for data loss, service interruptions, or gameplay issues
items.behaviour: We are not responsible for user behaviour or interactions
items.warranties: The Service is provided without warranties of any kind

liability.note: Use of the Service is at your own risk.

law.title: Governing Law
law.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the European Union, including applicable GDPR provisions, without regard to conflict-of-law principles.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: For questions regarding these Terms or the Service, please contact:

validation.score_must_equal_win_score: One score must equal the win score
validation.winner_must_have_winning_score: Winner must have the winning score

achievements.empty: No achievements in this category yet.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.friend_requests_desc: Get notified when someone sends you a friend request
notifications.game_invites_desc: Get notified when someone challenges you to a game
notifications.match_results_desc: Get notified about match outcomes from friends

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.description: Once you delete your account, there is no going back.
danger.action3: Your account,profile, and stats will be removed. Your match history will be preserved for other players.

header.subtitle: Pong is simple to pick up but takes practice to master. Here's everything you need to know.

controls.title: Controls
controls.subtitle: Different controls depending on the mode. In online play, everyone uses the same keys.

modes.title: Game Modes
modes.subtitle: Four ways to play, from casual practice to competitive tournaments.

local.name: Local 1v1
local.desc: Two players, one keyboard. Classic couch gaming. Player 1 uses W/S, Player 2 uses arrow keys.

ai.name: vs Computer
ai.desc: Practice against the AI. Great for warming up or learning the mechanics before going online.

online.name: Online Multiplayer
online.desc: Challenge players in real-time over WebSockets. Matchmake or invite friends directly from their profile.

tournament.name: Tournament
tournament.desc: Bracket-style competition. Join open tournaments, climb the bracket, and claim the championship title.

score_to_win.title: Score to win
score_to_win.body: The ball bounces between paddles. Score a point when your opponent misses the ball.

first_to_target.title: First to the target wins
first_to_target.body: Default is 5 points. Tournament matches may use different targets. Choose from 3, 5, 7, or 11 points.

ball_speeds_up.title: Ball speeds up
ball_speeds_up.body: Each rally makes the ball slightly faster. Longer rallies mean more intense gameplay.

angle_control.title: Angle control
angle_control.body: Where the ball hits your paddle affects its bounce angle. Hit with the edge for sharper angles.

no_pause_online.title: No pausing online
no_pause_online.body: Local and AI games can be paused. Online matches play continuously.

game_speeds.title: Game Speeds
game_speeds.body: Choose your pace before each match.

chill.title: Chill
chill.body: Relaxed speed. Perfect for beginners and casual play.

normal.title: Normal
normal.body: Standard competitive speed. The default for ranked and tournaments.

fast.title: Fast
fast.body: High-speed chaos. For experienced players looking for a challenge.

edges.title: Use the edges
edges.body: Hitting the ball with the edge of your paddle creates sharper angles that are harder to return.

anticipate.title: Anticipate, don't react
anticipate.body: Watch the ball angle and start moving before it crosses the midline.

center.title: Stay centered
center.body: After each return, move your paddle back toward the middle to cover more area.

practice.title: Practice vs AI first
practice.body: Computer mode is great for learning timing and paddle control before going online.

progression.title: Progression & XP
progression.subtitle: Coming Soon
progression.desc: Earn XP for every match, level up your profile, and unlock achievements. The progression system is currently in development.

play.title: Ready to play?
play.subtitle: Jump straight in — no account needed for local and AI games.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.addFriends: Add friends to see their rankings here!

friends.title: Friends
friends.tryDifferentName: Try a different name or username.
friends.searchPrompt: Search for users to add as friends
friends.typeAtLeastTwo: Type at least 2 characters to search.
friends.noFriendsYet: No friends yet. Search for users to add!
friends.findFriendsTab: Try a different name or check the Find Friends tab.

about.title: About
about.subtitleLine1: ft_transcendence is the final project of the 42 core curriculum.
about.subtitleLine2: A full-stack web application built from scratch as a team.
about.projectIntroLine1: In this final project we chose to build a multiplayer Pong game.
about.projectIntroLine2: With real-time gameplay, a modern and responsive user interface, and social features.
about.projectParagraph1: We designed and built a full-stack web application from scratch, with authentication across frontend and backend, database integration, session management, and password hashing, all running inside containers to ensure scalability and reproducibility.
about.projectParagraph2b: , providing a reactive and dynamic user experience.
about.projectParagraph3b: , with password hashing secured via Argon2. Input validation and schema safety are enforced using
about.projectParagraph4: The entire application is containerized using Docker to ensure portability, isolation, and consistent deployment across environments.
about.goalText: make something that's not just functional, but genuinely fun to play and beautiful to look at. 🏓✨
about.teamSubtitle: Four students, one goal: ship something we're proud of.
about.schoolDescription: is a global network of tuition-free coding schools with a peer-to-peer learning model. There are no teachers, no lectures — students learn by building real projects and helping each other. Ft_transcendence is the capstone project of the common core, requiring a team to build the ultimate test of everything we've learned.
about.schoolFooter: No teachers. No lectures. Just code, collaboration, and a whole lot of Pong.

403.footer: This area is off-limits. You need the right paddle to enter! 🔐

500.description: Something went wrong on our end. We're working to fix it!
500.footer: Our server missed the ball. Game over! 🎮

503.title: Under maintenance
503.description: We're doing some upgrades. Please check back in a few minutes.
503.footer: The server is taking a break. Come back soon! 🛠️

fallback.title: Error
fallback.footer: Something unexpected happened in the game! 🕹️
